info.name: FormaX Reporting Engine
info.description:
FormaX Reporting Engine API - Evaluation Edition.

Asynchronous renderer that fills Excel templates from JSON. Set the `base_url` and `jwt_token` collection variables before running. If the server has REPORTING_JWT_SECRET unset, leave jwt_token empty - auth is disabled for local evaluation only.

request.description: No auth required. Returns app name, version, edition, and the evaluation concurrency limit.

Multipart upload. `file` should point at the example template shipped in the distribution under samples/templates-to-upload/hospital_report.xlsx (or your own .xlsx). Response returns the generated `id` - copy it into the template_id collection variable.
Cached, best-effort sample JSON payload generated from the template's markers at upload time. Use this as a starting point for the Submit Report body.
Multipart upload. Keeps the same id and name, overwrites the .xlsx content and regenerates the cached sample.

Returns immediately with status QUEUED. Set the template_id collection variable to a template you've already uploaded (or its name). The top-level report_id field is optional - set the report_id collection variable to use your own caller-supplied tracking id instead of letting the engine generate one; leave it empty to auto-generate as before.
Poll until status is SUCCESS or FAILED. SUCCESS includes report_name, generated_at, and download_url.
